headline: Nothing cancels this year's CMF phone due to RAM prices
summary: Nothing has canceled its CMF Phone 2 Pro successor. The delay is attributed to soaring RAM memory prices. Co-founder Akis Evangelidis confirmed the decision on X.

headline: NASA selects Eric Schmidt's rocket company for a 2028 mission to Mars
summary: Relativity Space, led by Eric Schmidt, will launch NASA's Aeolus payload to Mars. The mission is scheduled for 2028 under a new public-private partnership. Relativity Space will provide the spacecraft, rocket, and cruise operations.

headline: Hue's wired wall modules bring non-smart lights into its ecosystem
summary: Philips Hue introduced its first wired wall modules. These modules integrate existing non-smart lights into the Hue system. New Play table/floor lamps and E14 bulb upgrades were also announced.

headline: The NTS Radio Player brings the best of internet radio to your hi-fi
summary: NTS Radio and Atonemo launched a dedicated player for NTS mixes. It brings NTS's streaming stations to various stereo setups. The player also supports AirPlay 2, Google Cast, Spotify, and Tidal Connect.

headline: CD Projekt Red Co-CEO Hopes Witcher 4 Wins Back Players After 'Heartbreaking' Cyberpunk 2077 Launch
summary: CD Projekt Red co-CEO Michał Nowakowski acknowledges Cyberpunk 2077's difficult launch. He believes the studio hasn't fully completed its 'redemption arc.' Nowakowski hopes The Witcher 4 will win back disappointed fans.

headline: Amazon Walks Away from Nearly Complete Sam Altman Movie Just Months After OpenAI Deal
summary: Amazon has dropped 'Artificial,' a movie about Sam Altman. The decision comes months after Amazon's deal with OpenAI. The film was reportedly nearing completion.

headline: Beat the Summer Heat With This $8 Portable Turbo Fan
summary: An $8 portable turbo fan is highlighted for summer. The deal aims to help users stay cool. It's presented as a budget-friendly cooling solution.

headline: Save $100 Off a Pair of BowFlex Results Series SelectTech Dumbbells Ahead of Amazon Prime Day
summary: A $100 discount is available on BowFlex SelectTech Dumbbells. The deal is offered ahead of Amazon Prime Day. Delivery by Father's Day is still possible with free shipping.

headline: 'People flew from their seats': Passengers describe how crash unfolded
summary: Passengers recounted the horrific train crash experience. Nearly 90 people were injured, over 30 seriously. Witnesses described people being thrown from their seats.

headline: What we know so far about Bedford train crash
summary: Two East Midland Railway trains collided near Bedford. Emergency services are currently on the scene. Details are emerging about the incident.

headline: Video shows scene of collision as passenger speaks about aftermath
summary: Footage shows the collision site of the train crash. Passenger Pete Knapp described the crash as a 'bomb explosion.' First-hand accounts detail the immediate aftermath of the incident.

headline: PM under pressure from Labour MPs and ministers to set timetable for exit
summary: The Prime Minister faces pressure from Labour MPs and ministers. They are pushing for a set timetable for an 'exit.' The transport secretary is reportedly advising Starmer to set a schedule.
